_meta.google_reviews_status: BLOCKED — headless Playwright served stripped Google Maps panel; no Reviews tab. Aggregator-derived reviews used. Recommend manual Google packet for v2.
fallback_sources_used: OpenTable mention (rating + review count via WebSearch)

verbatim_reviews.name: Alexa Luciani
verbatim_reviews.text: AYCE Hot Pot recommended. Food 4, Service 5, Atmosphere 5. $20–30 per person.

verbatim_reviews.name: Ivan Layese
verbatim_reviews.text: The all-you-can-eat buffet had tons of options, from juicy meats to fresh veggies. Food 5, Service 5, Atmosphere 5.

verbatim_reviews.name: anonymous
verbatim_reviews.text: The beef boneless short ribs are a favorite when it comes to BBQ, while malatang is recommended for the hot pot. The restaurant even has items like fries that kids love.

verbatim_reviews.name: anonymous
verbatim_reviews.text: First Asian BBQ and hot pot experience — amazing. A good place if you are looking for a fun thing to do with family, friends, a date night, honestly anything.

verbatim_reviews.name: anonymous
verbatim_reviews.text: Great combination of Hot Pot and Korean BBQ — buffet of veggies and sauces, unlimited meat, attentive service. Fresh and plentiful food and outstanding service make it a go-to recommendation.

verbatim_reviews.name: anonymous
verbatim_reviews.text: First time trying MAAX did not disappoint — ordered the traditional Szechuan spicy broth that was flavorful.

concept_signals.table_setup: Smokeless grills built into tables; tableside hot-pot burners
concept_signals.occasions: family, friends, date night, group dining, kids welcome
concept_signals.pricing: $20–30 per person (lunch) up to $30–50 (dinner / premium tiers)
concept_signals.amenities: Full liquor bar, draft selection, wheelchair accessible, OpenTable reservations

owner_voice_unknown: About page returned 404/timeout; no owner story exposed on current site. Recommend asking owner for: (1) founding year, (2) family/owner names, (3) origin story for the multi-cuisine pan-Asian + AYCE format choice.
